resources.string:
ℹ️ How it works:

1. The Red Alert app (Tzofar) sends rocket alerts as notifications
2. This app captures those notifications
3. Re-posts them as messaging-style notifications
4. Android Auto displays them on your car screen
5. Optionally reads them aloud via TTS

Make sure the Red Alert app is installed and configured with your area alerts.

To display alerts from this app on your car screen, enable "Unknown sources" in Android Auto:

1. Open the Android Auto app
2. Tap the ☰ menu icon
3. Scroll down and tap the version number 10 times
4. Tap OK to enable Developer mode
5. Go back to the menu → Developer settings
6. Enable "Allow apps from unknown sources"
